name={"isCommonPassword"} required={true} schemaName={"boolean"} qualifierMessage={undefined} schema={{"type":"boolean"}}></SchemaItem><SchemaItem collapsible={false} name={"isTooShort"} required={true} schemaName={"boolean"} qualifierMessage={undefined} schema={{"type":"boolean"}}></SchemaItem><SchemaItem collapsible={false} name={"minLength"} required={true} schemaName={"number"} qualifierMessage={undefined} schema={{"type":"number"}}></SchemaItem><SchemaItem collapsible={false} name={"policy"} required={true} schemaName={"string"} qualifierMessage={"**Possible values:** [`base`, `strong`, `nist`]"} schema={{"enum":["base","strong","nist"],"type":"string"}}></SchemaItem><SchemaItem collapsible={false} name={"warnings"} required={true} schemaName={"string[]"} qualifierMessage={"**Possible values:** [`PASSWORD_POLICY_BLOCKLISTED`]"} schema={{"items":{"enum":["PASSWORD_POLICY_BLOCKLISTED"],"type":"string"},"type":"array"}}></SchemaItem></ul></details></TabItem><TabItem label={"Example (from schema)"} value={"Example (from
